title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Emeritus - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Emeritus - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Emeritus, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Patna operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Emeritus:
Emeritus is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Emeritus!
